---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or report issues in CPKit documentation
title: 'docs: '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

**Where is the documentation issue located?**
Provide link to the file or line numbers (e.g. [design-system.md](docs/design-system.md#L45)).

**What needs to be improved?**
Describe the spelling mistake, incorrect parameter code, or outdated guidelines.

**Proposed Changes**
A clear and concise description of the new phrasing or documentation blocks you propose.
